title: Kaleidoscopes
description: Adds kaleidoscopes! Fun visuals! Made for the 1.21.8 ModFest, Toybox!
body:
Kaleidoscopes! Fun visuals! Made for Modfest 1.21.8.

Adds craftable a kaleidoscope, with the ability to add more. Uses post-process shaders for even more customization! Data-driven, with post-processor effects and shaders!
